title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: Farrey
subTitle: Brought up in an orphanage, child prodigy Niyati gets admitted into a prestigious school. Soon, surrounded by money, she gets engulfed in a cheating racket.

title: Luck by Chance
subTitle: Vikram can't believe his luck when he is chosen for a Bollywood lead role. However, the role may ruin his relationship with his girlfriend.

title: Ghost
subTitle: When an inexperienced lawyer chooses to defend a young politician who is accused of murdering his wife, a spirit begins to pursue her.

title: Gully Boy
subTitle: The life of an underdog rapper from Dharavi who struggles to express his views on social issues through rapping, changes completely after he bumps into Shrikant alias MC Sher.

title: Sankranti Ko Anne Vaale Hai
subTitle: When a renowned tech entrepreneur is abducted upon returning to India, a police officer seeks the help of her ex-boyfriend, a former cop living with his wife, to aid in the rescue mission.

title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
subTitle: A Sikh trucker and an aristocratic Muslim woman fall in love against the backdrop of the 1947 partition.

title: Businessman 2
subTitle: A money-minded tycoon gets into a beneficial relationship with a woman. Soon, he learns about the differences in his family and decides to end them.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
subTitle: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

title: Radhe
subTitle: Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.

title: Radhe
subTitle: Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.

title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
subTitle: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

title: Kismat Konnection
subTitle: Raj, an out-of-luck architect, and Priya, an out-of-love social activist, find themselves connected in a strange way by destiny.

title: Cirkus
subTitle: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

title: Jhoomo Nacho Gaao Yaaro
subTitle: A gifted dancer suffers a devastating loss when his rival orchestrates an accident that costs him his legs. Eventually, he seeks to take revenge on his enemy.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Dhamaal
subTitle: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

title: Krrish 3
subTitle: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

title: I
subTitle: A bodybuilder and successful model plans revenge after his enemies inject him with a substance that deforms his body.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Ajab Gazabb Love
subTitle: Rajveer, a rich man, falls in love with Madhuri. However, he soon realises that she detests affluent people and in order to win her heart, he, along with his family, pretends to be poor.

title: Sarkar 3
subTitle: Determined to protect public interest and his own authority, Sarkar finds himself locked in a cat-and-mouse game with his adversaries, both external and internal.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
